task_completion.description: Verify an invoice template is created for C&W Construction with the correct service, quantity, and price.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an Invoice or Invoice Template screen showing Business Partner 'C&W Construction' (or 'C&W'), a line item for 'Gardening Service' (or similar), Quantity '1', and Price/Amount '150.00'.

task_completion.description: Verify a recurring schedule record is created with the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Recurring' configuration screen where the Name field is exactly 'C&W Monthly Maintenance 2025'.

task_completion.description: Verify the recurring schedule is set to type 'Invoice' and linked to the template.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the Recurring configuration screen, look for the Recurring Type field set to 'Invoice' and a field linking to the previously created C&W Construction invoice/template.

task_completion.description: Verify the recurring frequency is set to Monthly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the Recurring configuration screen, look for the Frequency field set to 'Monthly' (or the code 'M').

task_completion.description: Verify the maximum runs for the recurring schedule is set to 12.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the Recurring configuration screen, look for the 'Maximum Runs' (or 'Runs Max') field set to '12'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the ERP/application GUI to configure the recurring invoice.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the actual ERP web interface (e.g., iDempiere) with menus, tabs, and form fields, not a terminal window executing SQL or API commands.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not fake the output in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs must be entered into the proper application fields (e.g., dropdowns, text boxes within the ERP system) rather than typed into a generic text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually saved the records.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for visual indicators that the records were saved, such as a 'Record Saved' status message, a generated document number, or the save icon appearing disabled/greyed out after clicking.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The business partner search key is 'C&W' (C&W Construction). The expected amount for the invoice template is 150.00. The recurring schedule name must be exactly 'C&W Monthly Maintenance 2025'. The frequency type code for Monthly is 'M'. The maximum runs must be exactly 12.
